task_completion.description: Open the ecrm_unlinked.vsp3 model in OpenVSP.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP application window is visible with the model loaded, indicated by the geometry browser or title bar showing 'ecrm_unlinked'.
A text editor or terminal window displays the contents of assembly_instructions.txt.

task_completion.description: Set the Wing's Parent to the Fuselage and its relative X Location to 13.5 m.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In OpenVSP, the Wing component is selected. In the XForm tab, the 'Parent' dropdown is set to Fuselage, and the 'X' location value is set to 13.5.

task_completion.description: Set the Vertical Tail's Parent to the Fuselage and its relative X Location to 35.0 m.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In OpenVSP, the Vertical Tail component is selected. In the XForm tab, the 'Parent' dropdown is set to Fuselage, and the 'X' location value is set to 35.0.

task_completion.description: Set the Horizontal Tail's Parent to the Vertical Tail, relative X Location to 2.0 m, and relative Z Location to 5.0 m.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In OpenVSP, the 'Tail' component (representing the horizontal tail) is selected. In the XForm tab, the 'Parent' dropdown is set to Vertical Tail, the 'X' location value is set to 2.0, and the 'Z' location value is set to 5.0.

task_completion.description: Save the assembled model to assembled_jet.vsp3.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP 'Save As' dialog is visible with the filename 'assembled_jet.vsp3', or a terminal command confirms the file was saved to the correct path.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenVSP GUI to modify the component hierarchy and locations.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through the OpenVSP Geometry Browser and XForm tabs rather than editing the .vsp3 XML file directly in a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not rename any components, as explicitly forbidden by the task description.
integrity.visual_evidence: The components in the Geometry Browser retain their original names (e.g., the horizontal tail remains named 'Tail' and is not renamed to 'Horizontal Tail').

integrity.description: The agent genuinely saved the file from within OpenVSP.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen using the File -> Save As menu in OpenVSP, rather than copying a pre-existing file using terminal commands.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected relative locations are Wing X=13.5, VTail X=35.0, HTail X=2.0, HTail Z=5.0. Note: The horizontal tail component is named 'Tail' in the model. The VLM should accept modifications to the 'Tail' component as fulfilling the horizontal tail requirements. The agent must not rename the 'Tail' component.
